no: Diablo 2 Necromancer kit for Cleric class. Summon, poison/bone, and curse skill trees. Summoned creatures follow through areas (optional). Skill points system: one per level up to 3M XP. Part of Shohy's Diablo2 Kit Pack Series. Author confirms EET compatibility. Languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese.

conflicts.reason: Both include Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons — installing both is redundant but not harmful

activated.effects: Raise skeletons, corpse explosion, undead army control.
Bone Armor, Bone Spear, Bone Spirit, poison/life drain.

restrictions.items: Loses standard Cleric spells/Turn Undead. D2 necromancy replaces divine casting. No dual-class. Based on Cleric class.

spellRestrictions.note: D2-style necromancy replaces standard Cleric spells/Turn Undead

hlaPool.note: D2 necromancer uses cleric chassis; skill point system replaces HLAs.

statBonus.note: D2 skill tree progression (Curses, Summoning, Bone/Poison trees).

new: Diablo 2-inspired death mage. Skeleton summoning, curses, and bone/poison magic.

sum: Diablo 2-inspired Necromancer kit for the Cleric class. Summon, poison/bone, and curse skill trees with optional area-persistent minions.

co.n: Extend level limits of Revive, Corpse Explosion, Poison Explosion and Attract to LV32
co.tp2n: Extend level limits of Revive, Corpse Explosion, Poison Explosion and Attract to LV32
co.no: Requires main kit component installed first

co.n: Survived monsters follow the Necromancer through different areas
co.tp2n: Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons (From cdtweaks)
co.no: Requires main kit component. May cause lag and bigger save data, especially in non-EE games.

co.n: Remove Summoning Cap for Regular Summons (From cdtweaks)
co.tp2n: Survived monsters follow the Necromancer through different areas (NOTE: may cause lag and bigger savedata, Especially in no EE games)
